cluster_identifier.description: The Cluster Identifier. Must be a lower case string.

amount.description: The limit amount. If time-based, this amount is in minutes. If data-based, this amount is in terabytes (TB). The value must be a positive number.

feature_type.description: The Amazon Redshift feature that you want to limit.

limit_type.description: The type of limit. Depending on the feature type, this can be based on a time duration or data size. If FeatureType is spectrum, then LimitType must be data-scanned. If FeatureType is concurrency-scaling, then LimitType must be time. If FeatureType is cross-region-datasharing, then LimitType must be data-scanned.

period.description: The time period that the amount applies to. A weekly period begins on Sunday.

breach_action.description: The action that Amazon Redshift takes when the limit is reached.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.
